raw_consumer_statement: There were fraudulent charges on my Barclays Bank XXXX credit card of {$700.00} and {$22.00}. I received text and email notifications and proceeded to call their fraud dept. to confirm they were in fact fraudulent charges. On XX/XX/XXXX, Barclays fraud dept. confirmed they were removing both fraud charges, cancelling my card and sending a new card. They did credit the {$22.00} charge but not the {$700.00} charge. I need this charge credited to my account including the interest and fees they are now charging since 2 months have elapsed and they have not resolved the issue. As/of XX/XX/XXXX the fraud charge and interest total {$720.00}. I have contacted Barclays customer service and fraud dept on XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX ( they were supposed to call me on XX/XX/XXXX with a status on the issue, I have no record of receiving the call and they closed my case because they claim they were not able to get in touch with me ) and today XX/XX/XXXX. No one is able to resolve this issue because they claim there is an error on my account on their system and they can not remove the charge. I've asked them to escalate the issue, but there does not seem to be a path or process for customer service, fraud dept, or managers to contact Barclays IT dept. I have spent XXXX hours in total on the phone and no resolution.
